item.title: DaVinci Resolve Video Editor – Free Professional Editing Software Guide
item.description:
1. Introduction

DaVinci Resolve is a powerful video editing software used to create professional-quality videos. It combines video editing, color correction, visual effects, motion graphics, and audio editing in one single platform. This tool solves the problem of using multiple apps for different editing tasks by providing everything in one place.

Whether you are a student working on a project, a YouTuber creating content, or a professional filmmaker, DaVinci Resolve can help you edit videos easily and efficiently. It is especially popular because it offers a free version with advanced features, making it accessible for beginners as well as experts.

item.title: Adobe Premiere Pro – Complete Guide to Professional Video Editing Software (2026)
item.description:

It is ideal for students learning web development, content creators building websites, businesses launching online platforms, and developers creating scalable applications. item.title: Is Buying Followers & Views Fake? Risks Explained
item.description:
How Websites Sell Followers, Subscribers & Views

Many websites on the internet offer services like buying YouTube views, Instagram followers, and social media likes. These platforms may look professional, but most of them use artificial methods to increase numbers.

1. Bot-Based Followers (Most Common Method)

The majority of these websites use automated bots. These bots are fake accounts created using software.

  • Thousands of fake profiles are generated
  • These bots follow your account
  • They increase likes, views, and subscribers

Example: If you buy 1000 followers, bots will follow your profile automatically.

item.title: HeyGen AI Video Generator – Complete Guide

What is HeyGen AI Video Generator?

HeyGen AI Video Generator is an advanced artificial intelligence tool that allows users to create professional-quality videos without using a camera, microphone, or video editing software. It uses AI avatars and text-to-speech technology to convert written scripts into engaging videos within minutes.

How Does HeyGen Work?

  • Write or paste your script
  • Select an AI avatar (virtual presenter)
  • Choose voice and language
  • Click on generate video
The AI automatically converts your text into a realistic video with voice and avatar presentation.

Main Features

  • Text-to-Speech: Natural human-like voices
  • Multi-language Support: Create videos in multiple languages
  • Templates: Ready-made video layouts
  • Customization: Add text, images, background, and branding

Use Cases

  • YouTube automation videos
  • Marketing and advertisements
  • Online education and tutorials
  • Product explanation videos
  • Social media content (Reels, Shorts)

Advantages

  • No camera or recording required

Disadvantages

Pricing Overview

Plan Features
Free Limited videos, watermark, basic avatars
Paid HD videos, premium avatars, more customization

Example

Suppose you want to create a video about a government scheme. You just need to write your script, choose an avatar and language, and the AI will generate a complete video presentation automatically.

item.title: Cloudflare R2 Complete Setup Guide - Gajab Tools
item.description:
Cloudflare R2: Complete Guide (What, Uses, Pricing & Setup)

Cloudflare R2 is an object storage service provided by Cloudflare that allows users to store and deliver large amounts of data such as images, videos, backups, and documents efficiently and at a lower cost.

Main Advantage: Cloudflare R2 offers Zero Egress Fees, meaning you do not pay for data transfer when users download your files.

What is Cloudflare R2?

Cloudflare R2 is similar to Amazon S3 and Google Cloud Storage, but it is designed to eliminate high bandwidth costs. It stores data in the form of objects inside containers called buckets.

item.title: Shopify Step-by-Step Guide for Beginners
item.description:
🛒 What is Shopify?

Shopify is a powerful e-commerce platform that allows you to create an online store and sell products without coding knowledge.

🚀 Step-by-Step Guide to Create a Shopify Store

🔹 Step 1: Create a Shopify Account

  • Go to Shopify official website
  • Click on Start Free Trial
  • Enter your email, password, and store name

🔹 Step 2: Setup Basic Store Details

  • Enter your business name
  • Add address and contact details
  • Select your country and currency

🔹 Step 3: Choose a Theme

  • Go to Online Store → Themes
  • Select a free or paid theme
  • Customize colors, logo, and layout

🔹 Step 4: Add Products

  • Go to Products → Add Product
  • Add product title, description, and images
  • Set price and inventory

🔹 Step 5: Setup Payment Methods

  • Go to Settings → Payments
  • Enable Shopify Payments / Razorpay / PayPal
  • Test payment process

🔹 Step 6: Setup Shipping

  • Go to Settings → Shipping
  • Create shipping zones
  • Add delivery charges

🔹 Step 7: Setup Domain

  • Go to Settings → Domains
  • Buy a new domain or connect existing domain

🔹 Step 8: Launch Your Store

  • Remove password protection
  • Click Publish Store
  • Your store is live 🎉

📈 Pro Tips for Success

  • Use high-quality product images
  • Write SEO-friendly descriptions
  • Add customer reviews
  • Promote via social media
Visit Shopify Website

🔚 Conclusion

Shopify makes it easy for anyone to start an online business. By following these steps, you can create and launch your store quickly.

item.title: What is RSS Feed? Complete Guide (Definition, Uses, Setup & Benefits)
item.description:
What is RSS Feed? Complete Guide (Definition, Uses, Setup & Benefits)

RSS Feed (Really Simple Syndication) is a technology that allows websites to automatically share their latest content (such as blog posts, news, or updates) with users and applications without requiring them to visit the site manually.

It works as a structured XML file that contains important information like post title, link, date, and summary.

How RSS Feed Works

  • A website generates an RSS feed (XML file)
  • A user or tool subscribes to that feed
  • Whenever new content is published, the feed updates automatically
  • The subscriber receives updates instantly

This makes RSS a powerful tool for automation and content distribution.

Why Use Notix?

item.title: Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) Complete Guide – Setup, Benefits & Alternatives
item.description:
Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) – Complete Guide

What is Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM)?

Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) is a free push notification service provided by Google. It allows developers to send notifications and messages to users on Android, iOS, and Web applications.

Official Website Firebase Console Web Setup Guide FCM API Docs
  • Send real-time notifications
  • Deliver data messages silently
  • Target specific users or groups
  • Works even when app is in background

How FCM Works

  1. User installs app or opens website
  2. Device generates a unique token
  3. Token is saved on your server
  4. You send message using Firebase
  5. FCM delivers message to user device

FCM Setup Guide (Step-by-Step)

Step 1: Create Firebase Project

  • Go to Firebase Console
  • Click on "Add Project"
  • Enter project name and create

Step 2: Add Your App

  • Android: Add package name
  • Web: Register web app
  • iOS: Add bundle ID

Step 3: Enable Cloud Messaging

  • Go to Project Settings
  • Open Cloud Messaging tab
  • Generate Server Key / VAPID Key

Step 4: Add Firebase SDK (Web)

<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.0.0/firebase-app.js"></script>
<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.0.0/firebase-messaging.js"></script>

Step 5: Initialize Firebase

const firebaseConfig = {
  apiKey: "YOUR_API_KEY",
  authDomain: "PROJECT_ID.firebaseapp.com",
  projectId: "PROJECT_ID",
  messagingSenderId: "SENDER_ID",
  appId: "APP_ID"
};

firebase.initializeApp(firebaseConfig);
const messaging = firebase.messaging();

Step 6: Request Permission

Notification.requestPermission().then((permission) => {
  if (permission === "granted") {
    messaging.getToken().then((token) => {
      console.log("Token:", token);
    });
  }
});

Step 7: Send Notification

  • Use Firebase Console
  • Or send via server API

Key Features of FCM

  • Free unlimited push notifications
  • Topic-based messaging
  • Device targeting
  • Scheduled notifications
  • Analytics support
  • Background message delivery

Benefits of FCM

  • 100% Free to use
  • Easy integration
  • Highly reliable (Google servers)
  • Scalable for millions of users
  • Real-time communication

FCM vs Other Alternatives

Feature FCM OneSignal Web Push (Self Hosted) AWS SNS
Cost Free Freemium Free (Server Cost) Paid
Setup Easy Very Easy Complex Medium
Analytics Basic Advanced Limited Limited
Scalability High High Depends Very High

Best Alternatives

  • OneSignal: Easy setup, marketing automation
  • Amazon SNS: Enterprise-level messaging
  • Pusher: Real-time messaging
  • Pushwoosh: Multi-channel marketing
  • Web Push Protocol: Full control without third-party

When Should You Use FCM?

  • If you need a free solution
  • If you are building apps or websites
  • If you want simple push notifications
  • If you don’t need advanced marketing tools

Limitations of FCM

  • No built-in marketing automation
  • Limited analytics
  • Requires coding knowledge
  • Token management complexity

Conclusion

Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) is one of the best free push notification services available. It is powerful, scalable, and ideal for developers who want full control over notifications.

item.title: OneSignal: Complete Guide with Features and Alternatives
item.description:
What is OneSignal? Complete Guide with Best Alternatives

OneSignal is a powerful push notification service that helps website owners, app developers, and businesses send real-time messages to users across web browsers, mobile apps, email, and SMS.

It is widely used to increase user engagement, bring visitors back to websites, and deliver important updates instantly.

Visit OneSignal

Key Features of OneSignal

  • Web Push Notifications: Send notifications directly to users’ browsers.
  • Mobile Push Support: Works with Android and iOS apps.
  • Email & SMS Integration: Multi-channel communication support.
  • Automation: Send automatic messages like welcome notifications.
  • User Segmentation: Target specific audiences based on behavior.
  • Analytics: Track delivery, open rate, and performance.

How OneSignal Works

  1. User visits your website and subscribes to notifications.
  2. OneSignal stores the subscriber data securely.
  3. You send notifications from the dashboard or automatically.
  4. Users receive messages in real-time on their device.

Advantages of OneSignal

  • Free plan available with powerful features
  • Easy integration with websites (including Hugo, WordPress, HTML)
  • Supports multiple platforms
  • Real-time user engagement
  • Automation saves time

Disadvantages of OneSignal

  • Advanced features require a paid plan
  • Limited customization in free version
  • Delivery delays may occur in some cases

Best Alternatives to OneSignal

1. Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM)

A free push notification service by Google, ideal for developers and Android apps.

item.title: Follow.it – Email Subscription Tool (Complete Guide, Features & Alternatives)

item.title: Microsoft Forms - Complete Guide - Gajab Tools
item.description:

Open Microsoft Forms Microsoft Official Website Create New Form
It is widely used in schools, offices, and businesses for data collection and feedback.

  • Create online registration forms
  • Conduct quizzes and exams
  • Collect customer feedback
  • Employee surveys
  • Event registrations

⚙️ Key Features

  • Easy-to-use interface
  • Mobile-friendly design
  • Real-time response tracking
  • Automatic charts and graphs
  • Export data to Excel
  • Share via link or QR code

📝 How to Create a Form

  1. Go to Microsoft Forms website
  2. Click on "New Form"
  3. Add title and description
  4. Insert questions (Text, MCQ, Rating, etc.)
  5. Customize settings
  6. Click "Share" and copy the link

📊 Comparison with Other Tools

Tool Best For Free Plan Design Special Feature
Microsoft Forms Office Users Yes Clean Excel Integration
Google Forms Beginners Yes Simple Easy Sharing
Typeform Premium UX Limited ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Interactive Design
Jotform Business Yes Advanced Templates
Zoho Forms CRM Users Yes Professional Automation

🔍 Detailed Differences

Microsoft Forms vs Google Forms

  • Microsoft Forms works best with Office tools
  • Google Forms is more popular and beginner-friendly

Microsoft Forms vs Typeform

  • Microsoft Forms is simple and free
  • Typeform offers better design and interaction

Microsoft Forms vs Jotform

  • Microsoft Forms is basic
  • Jotform offers advanced customization

Microsoft Forms vs Zoho Forms

  • Microsoft Forms is simple
  • Zoho Forms offers automation and CRM integration

✅ Advantages

  • Free and easy to use
  • Works well with Microsoft Office
  • Quick form creation
  • Automatic data analysis

❌ Disadvantages

  • Limited design customization
  • Less advanced than competitors
  • Basic features only

🧠 Conclusion

Microsoft Forms is a simple, fast, and efficient tool for creating forms and quizzes. It is best for beginners, students, and office users who want quick data collection without complex setup.

How to Start with WordPress (Step-by-Step)

  1. Buy a domain name (e.g., yoursite.com)
  2. Purchase hosting (Hostinger, Bluehost, etc.)
  3. Install WordPress using one-click installer

  6. Create pages (Home, About, Contact)
  7. Publish your content

item.description:
CLOUDFLARE

Speed • Security • Performance

Go To Cloudflare Dashboard

🌐 What is Cloudflare? (Complete Guide)

Cloudflare is a web performance and security service that helps make your website faster, more secure, and highly reliable. It acts as a protective layer between your website and visitors.

🚀 How Cloudflare Works?

  1. User sends a request to open your website
  2. The request first goes to Cloudflare servers
  3. Cloudflare checks if the request is safe or malicious
  4. Safe traffic is forwarded to your origin server
  5. Cached data is served for faster response

🔥 Key Features

⚡ CDN (Content Delivery Network)

Global servers deliver your content from the nearest location for faster loading.

item.title: Luma AI – Complete Guide
item.description:
Luma AI

Turn Real World into 3D with AI

What is Luma AI?

Luma AI is an advanced artificial intelligence tool that allows users to create highly realistic 3D models and environments using photos or videos. It uses a powerful technology called NeRF (Neural Radiance Fields) to convert real-world scenes into digital 3D assets.

Simply record a video with your phone, and Luma AI will transform it into a detailed 3D model.

Uses of Luma AI

  • 3D scanning of objects, rooms, and spaces
  • Game development and VFX creation
  • 3D product display in e-commerce
  • Content creation for YouTube and social media
  • Educational and research purposes

How Luma AI Works

  1. Capture photos or videos of an object or place
  2. Upload the data to Luma AI
  3. AI processes the data using NeRF technology
  4. Generates a realistic 3D scene or model
  5. Export or share the 3D result

Key Features

  • Ultra-realistic 3D rendering
  • Mobile-friendly capture
  • Cloud-based processing
  • Beginner-friendly interface
  • Multiple export options

Why Luma AI is Different from Other AI Tools

Feature Luma AI Other AI Tools
Focus 3D Capture & Modeling Text, Image, Chat
Technology NeRF-based GAN / LLM-based
Input Photos & Videos Text or Images
Output 3D Models Text / Images

Benefits of Luma AI

  • No need for expensive 3D equipment
  • High accuracy and realism
  • Time-saving workflow
  • Useful for AR/VR and metaverse

Limitations

  • Requires good quality camera for best results
  • Processing can take time
  • Internet required (cloud processing)

Future Scope

Luma AI has strong potential in the future of AR/VR, metaverse, gaming, and online shopping. It can change how we interact with digital content by bringing real-world objects into virtual environments.

item.title: Google Plus (Google+) – History, Launch and Shutdown Reason
item.description:
Google Plus (Google+) – History, Launch and Shutdown Reason

Google Plus (Google+) was a social networking platform created by Google. It was designed to compete with other popular social media platforms such as Facebook and Twitter. Users could share posts, photos, videos, and connect with friends or communities.

Launch Date of Google+

Event Date
Google+ Launch 28 June 2011
Public Access September 2011
Shutdown Announcement October 2018
Official Shutdown 2 April 2019

Main Features of Google+

  • Circles: Users could organize friends into groups.
  • Hangouts: Video calling and messaging feature.
  • Communities: Discussion groups for specific topics.
  • +1 Button: Similar to a "Like" button.
  • Photo Sharing: Easy photo and album sharing.

Reasons Why Google+ Was Shut Down

  • Low User Engagement: Most users preferred Facebook and Twitter.
  • Security Bug: A data leak vulnerability exposed user information.
  • Business Decision: Google decided to focus on other services.
GooglePlus+ Link Check Wikipedia Article

Conclusion

Google Plus was an ambitious attempt by Google to enter the social media market. Despite having several innovative features, it failed to compete with established platforms. Due to low user engagement and security concerns, Google officially shut down Google+ in April 2019.

item.title: Advantages and Disadvantages of Artificial Intelligence
item.description:
Artificial Intelligence (AI): Benefits, Risks & Future Impact

🤖 What is Artificial Intelligence?

Artificial Intelligence (AI) is a modern technology that enables machines and software to think, learn, understand, and make decisions similar to humans. AI systems can analyze data, recognize patterns, solve problems, and automate tasks.

🧠 Advantages of Artificial Intelligence

  • High Speed & Accuracy: AI can process massive data quickly with fewer errors.
  • Healthcare Support: Helps in early disease detection, medical imaging, and drug research.
  • Improved Education: Personalized learning based on student performance.
  • Business Growth: Automation reduces costs and increases productivity.
  • 24×7 Availability: AI systems never get tired and work continuously.
  • Safety in Risky Jobs: Useful in mining, disaster zones, defense, and space missions.
  • Smart Assistance: Virtual assistants help with daily tasks and reminders.
Result: AI saves time, reduces effort, and increases efficiency in almost every field.

⚠️ Disadvantages of Artificial Intelligence

  • Job Loss: Automation may replace traditional human jobs.
  • Privacy Risks: Personal data misuse and surveillance concerns.
  • Fake Content: Deepfakes and AI-generated misinformation.
  • Over-Dependence: Reduced human thinking and creativity.
  • High Cost: Developing and maintaining AI systems is expensive.
  • Wrong Decisions: AI depends on data quality — bad data leads to bad results.
Warning: AI is powerful but must be used responsibly and ethically.

🤝 How AI Works With Humans

Human Strengths AI Strengths
Creativity & Innovation Fast Data Processing
Emotions & Empathy Large-scale Data Analysis
Ethical Judgment Automation of Repetitive Tasks
Critical Thinking Pattern Recognition

AI is designed to assist humans, not replace them. The best results come when humans and AI work together.

item.title: What is Meta AI? Uses, Benefits & How to Earn Money
item.description:

Meta AI is an advanced Artificial Intelligence system developed by Meta. It works as a smart digital assistant that helps users with conversations, content creation, image generation, learning, and business tasks.

Meta AI is integrated into popular social platforms, making it easy for millions of users to access AI tools directly inside their favorite apps.

item.title: What is Kling AI? Benefits and How to Make Money
item.description:
What is Kling AI?

Kling AI is an advanced AI video generation tool that creates realistic videos from text prompts or images. It allows users to produce cinematic, high-quality videos without cameras, actors, or complex editing software.

In simple words: Type what you want → AI creates a professional video automatically.

Key Benefits of Kling AI

🎬 1. Text-to-Video Creation

Just write a scene description and Kling AI converts it into a video.

item.title: What is OpenAI, ChatGPT vs OpenAI & Ways to Earn Money ?
item.description:
What is OpenAI?

OpenAI is an artificial intelligence (AI) research and technology company that builds powerful AI tools for people and businesses. Its mission is to ensure that artificial intelligence benefits all of humanity.

OpenAI develops advanced AI models that can:

  • Understand and generate human-like text
  • Create images from written prompts
  • Recognize and convert speech into text
  • Help developers build smart applications
In simple words: OpenAI creates smart computer systems that can think, write, speak, and assist humans.

What is ChatGPT?

ChatGPT is an AI chatbot created by OpenAI. It communicates with users like a human and helps with many tasks.

item.title: What is Canva? Uses, Earning Methods and Important Information

item.title: What is Veo 3? Google’s Powerful AI Video Generation Model
item.description:
🎬 What is Veo 3? — Explained in Simple Words

Veo 3 is Google’s advanced AI video generation model that can create high-quality cinematic videos using simple text prompts or images. It uses artificial intelligence to understand your instructions and turns them into realistic videos with sound, motion, and visual effects.

👉 In simple terms: You type what you want to see, and Veo 3 creates a video for you.

✨ Key Features of Veo 3

1️⃣ Text-to-Video Generation

Just write a description like: “A beautiful sunrise over mountains with soft background music” and the AI will generate a complete video scene.

item.title: What is Google Speech Generator?
item.description:

Google Speech Generator is an AI-based service that converts written text into a natural human-like voice.

It is powered by Google Cloud technology and uses neural networks to produce realistic, high-quality speech.

🌟 Key Features

item.title: What is ChatGPT? Powers, Uses & Future Explained
item.description:
🤖 What is ChatGPT? Its Powers, Uses & Future

ChatGPT is an advanced Artificial Intelligence (AI) chatbot developed by OpenAI. It is designed to understand human language and respond naturally like a human conversation partner.

ChatGPT is based on GPT (Generative Pre-trained Transformer) technology, trained on vast amounts of text data to generate intelligent responses.

🧠 How Does ChatGPT Work?

ChatGPT uses machine learning, deep learning, and transformer architecture to understand user input and generate relevant responses. It analyzes context and produces meaningful answers within seconds.
